scripts.build: python3 scripts/merge_deadlines.py && python3 scripts/validate_conferences.py && python3 scripts/generate_ics.py && next build
scripts.sync:deadlines: python3 scripts/sync_mlciv.py && python3 scripts/sync_ccfddl.py && python3 scripts/merge_deadlines.py && python3 scripts/validate_conferences.py
